Stop.description: End-of-session billing panel. Add this hook to ~/.claude/settings.json or your project .claude/settings.json to automatically prompt for time entry at the end of each Claude Code session. The cold-start-interview will offer to do this for you.

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$billingConfig = '~/.claude/plugins/config/claude-for-legal/billing/CLAUDE.md'; if (Test-Path $billingConfig) { $content = Get-Content $billingConfig -Raw; if ($content -notmatch '\[PLACEHOLDER\]' -and $content -match 'Billing panel at end of session: enabled') { Write-Output 'BILLING_PANEL_TRIGGER' } }"

_setup_note: This file documents the recommended hook configuration. To activate the end-of-session billing panel, run /billing:cold-start-interview and choose to enable it — the setup interview will configure your settings.json automatically. Alternatively, add a Stop hook manually in your ~/.claude/settings.json that runs /billing:billing-status.
